source_jobs.title: Junior Isometric 2D Artist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm http://taongafarm.com is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more—transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

The exquisite art style of the game is what our players consistently mention as the first reason for loving Taonga. We achieve this unique aesthetic with strict and graceful construction, immaculate lineart and delicate, painterly rendering. Our Artists specialise either in construction or in colouring, depending on personal preferences and professional strengths.

We are looking for a creative and driven Junior 2D Artist to join our team in expanding the world of Taonga and bringing delightful experiences to our players.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/7f0cac34-0ece-4181-9f42-5598e9a1c1dc/Group-1-copy-7.png]


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Creating all types of isometric in-game assets: buildings and structures, vegetation, environmental props, item icons.


OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE

 - Has a genuine passion for playing and developing games

 - Has experience creating game art in isometric projection

 - Is an experienced user of a professional graphic editor program

 - Has a strong understanding of composition, material properties and form plasticity

 - Possesses a refined aesthetic taste

 - We require a portfolio of your work to apply for this position.

 - The application process may include a test assignment.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/f21f658a-6753-4186-85d3-c049afb58e6a/photo_office.png]


WHO YOU'LL BE WORKING WITH

We are a high-performing team of professionals who thrive in a focused environment. We achieve exceptional results through rigorous planning and disciplined execution, which allows us to deliver outstanding quality while protecting our time of leisure and rest.

Gaming is an inherent part of our lives. With a wide range of tastes across genres, we keep fresh the understanding of what it's like to have fun in a game. Together we apply this knowledge to create experiences full of joy and wonder for our players.


WHERE YOU'LL BE WORKING AT

We work on-site in a modern business building in Limassol. We like a lot of space and a lot of air, and we built our office to create a calm and comfortable environment, conductive to the state of flow.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/e3f304a2-b263-4eb9-a6b8-1c6b029c685f/photo_team.png]


VOLKA BENEFITS

✈️ Relocation Support: Moving countries is stressful. We handle the tickets, accounts and permits for you and your family. We provide temporary accommodations while you're getting settled, cover the first rent of your own apartment and help with necessary furnishings.

🌿 The Office: A beautiful modern workspace with convenient parking and a kitchen well-stocked with fresh fruit, drinks and snacks.

🧑‍⚕️ Medical Insurance: We provide top-tier medical insurance for you, your partner and children.

📊 Provident Fund: Ability to join the company's Provident Fund programme which allows you to save for your future with additional company contributions.

🥗 Paid Lunches: A monthly allowance to order healthy and nutritious lunches from your favorite venues on Wolt.

🚌 School Fee Benefit: A subsidy for each child to cover childcare or tuition fees, including summer camps and extracurricular activities.

🏀 Sports Benefit: Membership in the company-wide programme with access to the best gyms and sports centers.

📚 L&D Options: Opportunity to take courses and certifications to improve your skills.

🌍 Language Learning + Naturalization Support: Monthly budg

source_jobs.title: Player Support Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm http://taongafarm.com is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more—transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

We are looking for a dedicated Player Support Specialist to join our team in expanding the world of Taonga and bringing delightful experiences to our players.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/7f0cac34-0ece-4181-9f42-5598e9a1c1dc/Group-1-copy-7.png]


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Providing player support - answering game-related questions, resolving technical and payment issues, addressing complaints

 - Managing reviews on Google Play and App Store

 - Moderating the game chat and social networks

 - Monitoring game performance (with Grafana and other tools)

 - Informing the developers of emerging issues

 - Participating in testing game updates and the game Portal, collaborating closely with QA

 - Collecting player feedback.


OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE

 - Is fluent in English (C1 Advanced Level)

 - Has strong technical proficiency on both PC and mobile devices

 - Is ready and willing to learn and enhance qualifications, including through company-sponsored courses

 - Has extensive gaming experience and passion for games

 - Is highly self-disciplined and responsible

 - Has an up-to-date PC, an Android mobile device, a stable internet connection.

You will have the opportunity to showcase your skills through our test assignment.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/04d6a447-3c99-4279-85cf-418453f41251/photo_team.png]


WHO YOU'LL BE WORKING WITH

We are a high-performing team of professionals who thrive in a focused environment. We achieve exceptional results through rigorous planning and disciplined execution, which allows us to deliver outstanding quality while protecting our time of leisure and rest.

Gaming is an inherent part of our lives. With a wide range of tastes across genres, we keep fresh the understanding of what it's like to have fun in a game. Together we apply this knowledge to create experiences full of joy and wonder for our players.


WHAT WE OFFER

 1. 100% remote work (except from Russia and Belarus)

 2. Work schedule: Sunday to Thursday, 6:00–15:00 Cyprus time (EET), including a 1-hour lunch break

 3. Onboarding period schedule: Sunday to Thursday, 11:00–20:00 Cyprus time (EET), including a 1-hour lunch break

 4. Shifts on public holidays based on team needs

 5. Hourly pay rate depending on the test assignment and interview

 6. Position as an independent contractor.

source_jobs.title: Support Team Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm https://taongafarm.com/en/play/ is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more—transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

Taonga was launched as a browser game in 2016 and became an immediate success, beloved by players worldwide. With communities across different platforms, we entertain, delight and help our players to enjoy Taonga to the fullest.

We are looking for an experienced Support Team Lead who will ensure stable and high-quality performance of our support team in a rapidly developing game environment.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/5b59ec46-095b-49dc-89c0-6ce9ea432389/Group-1-copy-7.png]


RESPONSIBILITIES

 1.  Ensuring high-quality, effective communication between the support team and players.

 2.  Managing crisis situations related to players and within the team, including game outages.

 3.  Handling payment disputes, GDPR requests, and complex escalated tickets.

 4.  Ensuring quality and comprehensiveness of knowledge bases for players.

 5.  Maintaining our ticketing systems.

 6.  Monitoring the technical condition of our games (using Grafana and other tools).

 7.  Maintaining and improving internal documentation and support team guidelines.

 8.  Managing and developing the support team, conducting regular performance reviews.

 9.  Collaborating closely with community managers, QA, game designers, and programmers.

 10. Handling regular tickets and other basic support team tasks during periods of high workload.


OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE

 1. Has 2+ years of experience in customer support.

 2. 1+ year of experience managing a team.

 3. Advanced (C1) proficiency in written English

 4. Able to make well-reasoned decisions under pressure

 5. A passionate gamer with deep industry knowledge.

The application process includes a test assignment.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/2a1d34ed-c8f6-4b5e-8fba-b971fa9765ea/photo_office.png]

Gaming is an inherent part of our lives. With a wide range of tastes across genres, we keep fresh the understanding of what it's like to have fun in a game. Together we apply this knowledge to create experiences full of joy and wonder for our players.


WHERE YOU'LL BE WORKING AT

We work on-site in a modern business building in Limassol. We like a lot of space and a lot of air, and we built our office to create a calm and comfortable environment, conductive to the state of flow.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/c0235383-99c5-4a9e-a66c-70842dd08271/photo_team.png]

source_jobs.title: Senior Motion Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm https://taongafarm.com/en/play/ is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more — transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

Animations have always played a key role in bringing the enchanting world of Taonga to life. Our marketing videos are no exception, bringing the island's charm to life and captivating players around the globe.

We’re hiring a talented Senior Motion Designer to create high-quality 3D and 2D creations for Taonga marketing videos. You’ll work on cinematic and gameplay-based videos that bring our tropical world to life — combining storytelling, animation, composition, lighting, and visual effects to craft compelling marketing content for a global audience.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/39f9814d-4d39-4c9c-add4-004e4b6a5e91/image%20(3).png]


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Create high-quality 3D and 2D creations, including character animation, visual effects, and sound design for game advertising

 - Set up composition, camera movement, and lighting to enhance the visual appeal of marketing videos

 - Develop and manage internal libraries, templates, and animation assets

 - Ensure all work follows design guidelines, asset naming conventions, and technical specifications

 - Research and implement emerging tools, workflows, and AI-driven technologies to keep the motion design pipeline innovative and efficient


REQUIREMENTS

 - Genuine passion for playing games, storytelling, and visual excellence

 - Minimum 4 years of professional experience in motion design, 3D/2D animation, and minimum 6 months in game marketing

 - Professional knowledge of Unreal Engine cinematic tools, including node-based programming with Blueprints, Sequencer and Niagara

 - Professional knowledge of After Effects and DaVinci Resolve (preferred) or similar editing software (Final Cut Pro X, Premiere Pro)

 - Professional knowledge of character animation, sound design, VFX, directing, cinematography, and editing

 - Hands-on experience with motion capture pipelines (Xsens, or similar technologies)

 - Knowledge of AI-based creative tools for animation, VFX, or asset generation

 - Basic scripting or storyboarding experience is considered an advantage

 - English proficiency at A2 level or higher

The application process includes a test assignment.

A portfolio of your work is required to apply for this position.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/7b4d9365-92d2-425d-a0a4-700d16d82427/photo_office_M%20(1).png]


WHO YOU'LL BE WORKING WITH

At Volka, you’ll work both independently and collaboratively when needed, in a respectful and supportive environment that values your ideas and well-being. To succeed, you’ll need to stay organized, keep learning, and consistently bring your best to help achieve shared goals with the team.

Gaming has always been a big part of our lives. With our love for different genres, we never lose sight of what makes a game truly fun. We bring that passion into everything we create – making joyful, exciting experiences for players everywhere.


WHERE YOU'LL BE WORKING AT

Located in a historic three-story building in the heart of the city, our office offers a fresh, welcoming atmosphere – the perfect environment to feel inspired while staying focused and productive.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/3f65919e-2b93-4765-88b1-77199ed741f2/photo_team_M%20(1).png]


VOLKA BENEFITS

✈️ Relocation Support: Moving countries is stressful. We handle the tickets, accounts and permits for you and your family. We

source_jobs.title: Junior Narrative Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm http://taongafarm.com is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more—transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

Stories play a key role in creating the unique charm of Taonga and turning everyday tasks into exciting adventures. Vivid and charismatic characters make every update memorable for our players.

We are looking for a talented and motivated Narrative Designer to join our team and help expand the world of Taonga by creating engaging stories, writing lively dialogues, and coming up with catchy names for in-game items that players will love.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/bd03eece-4d83-4270-9a2b-a8cf7d248dcf/image.png]


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Crafting and editing engaging stories for new game adventures

 - Writing dynamic, lively dialogues between characters

 - Designing background stories for in-game characters that will enrich the world of our game and the experience of our players.


REQUIREMENTS

 - Extensive gaming experience and passion for games

 - Experience writing creative texts

 - High level of literacy

 - Pre-Intermediate or higher level of English.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/379ee6be-72d0-41dc-8a5a-41da8f33b65f/image.png]

Gaming is an inherent part of our lives. With a wide range of tastes across genres, we keep fresh the understanding of what it's like to have fun in a game. Together we apply this knowledge to create experiences full of joy and wonder for our players.


WHERE YOU'LL BE WORKING AT

We work on-site in a modern business building in Limassol. We like a lot of space and a lot of air, and we built our office to create a calm and comfortable environment, conductive to the state of flow.

VOLKA BENEFITS

✈️ Relocation Support: Moving countries is stressful. We handle the tickets, accounts and permits for you and your family. We provide temporary accommodations while you're getting settled, cover the first rent of your own apartment and help with necessary furnishings.

🌿 The Office: A beautiful modern workspace with convenient parking and a kitchen well-stocked with fresh fruit, drinks and snacks.

🧑‍⚕️ Medical Insurance: We provide top-tier medical insurance for you, your partner and children.

📊 Provident Fund: Ability to join the company's Provident Fund programme which allows you to save for your future with additional company contributions.

🥗 Paid Lunches: A monthly allowance to order healthy and nutritious lunches from your favorite venues on Wolt.

🚌 School Fee Benefit: A subsidy for each child to cover childcare or tuition fees, including summer camps and extracurricular activities.

🏀 Sports Benefit: Membership in the company-wide programme with access to the best gyms and sports centers.

📚 L&D Options: Opportunity to take courses and certifications to improve your skills.

🌍 Language Learning + Naturalization Support: Monthly budget for English or Greek classes with your preferred tutor. And once you're ready to call Cyprus your home we'll help navigate the path to naturalization.

🎁Annual Bonus: 13th Salary paid towards the end of the year to all VOLKA employees.

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm http://taongafarm.com is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more—transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

Taonga was launched as a browser game in 2016 and became an immediate success, beloved by players worldwide. With communities across different platforms, we entertain, delight and help our players to enjoy Taonga to the fullest.

We are looking for an experienced and focused Lead Community Manager to strengthen our team and drive the growth of our game communities.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/7f0cac34-0ece-4181-9f42-5598e9a1c1dc/Group-1-copy-7.png]

 - Managing the community team and conducting regular performance reviews.

 - Driving community growth by identifying and implementing new opportunities.

 - Managing crisis situations within the team and player community.

 - Creating and coordinating engaging content, including announcements, activities, email newsletters, and game guides.

 - Evaluating the effectiveness of various player engagement formats.

 - Ensuring high-quality communication between the community team and players.

 - Maintaining and improving community management guidelines.

 - Preparing reports on player feedback and team performance.

 - Collaborating closely with support, QA, the art team, and game designers.

 - Monitoring industry trends and implementing best practices.


OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE

 - 2+ years of experience in community management within the gaming industry.

 - 1+ year of experience mentoring or leading a team.

 - English proficiency at C1 (Advanced) level.

 - Ability to make well-reasoned decisions under pressure.

 - A passionate gamer with active engagement in gaming communities.

source_jobs.title: 2D Character Artist (Promo)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm https://taongafarm.com/en/play/ is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more—transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

Taonga was launched as a browser game in 2016 and became an immediate success, beloved by players worldwide. With communities across different platforms, we entertain, delight and help our players to enjoy Taonga to the fullest.

We are looking for a creative 2D Character Artist to join our Promo Art team creating illustrations for Taonga: the Island Farm!

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/2ca5bf7c-1ae9-457a-ac26-e0c7e92a6c0f/Group-1-copy-7.png]

RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Drawing and final rendering of characters based on given concepts;

 - Creating character illustrations based on general descriptions.


OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE

 - Has an art education;

 - Has a strong understanding of character form and movement;

 - Has a strong ability to convey character emotions;

 - Has solid knowledge of anatomy;

 - Has proficiency in graphic software (Adobe Photoshop, Paint Tool SAI, or similar);

 - Has a refined aesthetic sense;

 - Has a portfolio;
   
   The application process includes a test assignment.

🥗 Paid Lunches: A monthly allowance to order healthy and nutritious lunches from your favorite venues on Wolt.

🏀 Sports Benefit: Membership in the company-wide programme with access to the best gyms and sports centers.

📚 L&D Options: Opportunity to take courses and certifications to improve your skills.

🌍 Language Learning + Naturalization Support: Monthly budget for English or Greek classes with your preferred tutor. And once you're ready to call Cyprus your home we'll help navigate the path to naturalization.

source_jobs.title: Graphic Designer (Promo art)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm https://taongafarm.com/en/play/ is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more—transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

Taonga was launched as a browser game in 2016 and became an immediate success, beloved by players worldwide. With communities across different platforms, we entertain, delight and help our players to enjoy Taonga to the fullest.

We are looking for a creative Graphic Designer to join our Promo Design team creating materials for Taonga: the Island Farm!

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/2ca5bf7c-1ae9-457a-ac26-e0c7e92a6c0f/Group-1-copy-7.png]

RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Creating promotional materials using ready-made artwork;

 - Animating promo materials in After Effects;

 - Searching for and using stock materials;

 - Drawing graphic elements.


OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE HAS

 - Excellent Adobe Photoshop skills;

 - Strong drawing skills and a good eye for typography;

 - Animation experience;

 - A genuine passion for games;

 - Willingness to complete a test task;

 - A portfolio (essential).
   
   The application process includes a test assignment.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/df7e2542-2fbb-4f1e-bb88-82ea5fd41905/photo_office.png]


WHO YOU'LL BE WORKING WITH

We are a high-performing team of professionals who thrive in a focused environment. We achieve exceptional results through rigorous planning and disciplined execution, which allows us to deliver outstanding quality while protecting our time of leisure and rest.

Gaming is an inherent part of our lives. With a wide range of tastes across genres, we keep fresh the understanding of what it's like to have fun in a game. Together we apply this knowledge to create experiences full of joy and wonder for our players.


WHERE YOU'LL BE WORKING AT

We work on-site in a modern business building in Limassol. We like a lot of space and a lot of air, and we built our office to create a calm and comfortable environment, conductive to the state of flow.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/6b539a8c-b03a-4fbd-96e0-2386c4fa35b1/photo_team.png]


VOLKA BENEFITS

✈️ Relocation Support: Moving countries is stressful. We handle the tickets, accounts and permits for you and your family. We provide temporary accommodations while you're getting settled, cover the first rent of your own apartment and help with necessary furnishings.

🌿 The Office: A beautiful modern workspace with convenient parking and a kitchen well-stocked with fresh fruit, drinks and snacks.

🧑‍⚕️ Medical Insurance: We provide top-tier medical insurance for you, your partner and children.

📊 Provident Fund: Ability to join the company's Provident Fund programme which allows you to save for your future with additional company contributions.

🥗 Paid Lunches: A monthly allowance to order healthy and nutritious lunches from your favorite venues on Wolt.

🚌 School Fee Benefit: A subsidy for each child to cover childcare or tuition fees, including summer camps and extracurricular activities.

🏀 Sports Benefit: Membership in the company-wide programme with access to the best gyms and sports centers.

📚 L&D Options: Opportunity to take courses and certifications to improve your skills.

🌍 Language Learning + Naturalization Support: Monthly budget for English or Greek classes with your preferred tutor. And once you're ready to call Cyprus your home we'll help navigate the path to naturalization.

🎁Annual Bonus: 13th Salary paid towards the end of the year to all VOLKA employees.

source_jobs.title: Immigration Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT OUR GAME

Taonga: the Island Farm https://taongafarm.com/en/play/ is an immersive exploration and adventure game set on a colorful tropical archipelago.

What begins as a casual farming experience gradually evolves into a rich, multi-layered adventure. Players discover increasing depth through travel, story-driven quests, strategic battles, engaging mini-games, competitive events, and much more — transforming the game into a captivating midcore adventure with sophisticated mechanics.

We’re hiring an experienced Mid-Senior Immigration Specialist to lead and coordinate all aspects of employee immigration lifecycle and mobility. You’ll play a key role in creating a smooth and positive experience for international employees, guiding them through every stage of the immigration journey, from pre-arrival and onboarding to ongoing employment.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/39f9814d-4d39-4c9c-add4-004e4b6a5e91/image%20(3).png]


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Manage corporate immigration and mobility processes for international employees and their dependents, including:
   
   - work permits;
   
   - visas;
   
   - residence permits;
   
   - relocations;
   
   - naturalization.

 - Prepare and submit immigration applications and supporting documentation (e.g., EU Blue Card Permits, hosting visas, e-visas, and non-domicile applications).

 - Advise employees and their families on immigration, relocation, onboarding, and offboarding matters.

 - Support employee relocations, including assistance with bank account setup and obtaining official documents.

 - Liaise with government authorities, embassies, external legal/immigration providers, and internal stakeholders; attend authorities when required for submissions, collections, and follow-ups.

 - Monitor visa and permit expirations and maintain accurate immigration records.

 - Ensure compliance with immigration, labour, and regulatory requirements in Cyprus and the rest of the world.

 - Track legislative changes and provide guidance on immigration risks, policies, and processes.

 - Develop immigration procedures and collaborate with HR, Administration, and external stakeholders to support employee mobility.


REQUIREMENTS

 - Excellent Knowledge of Greek & English language.

 - Minimum of 3–5+ years of dedicated, hands-on Cyprus immigration experience (ideally a blend of provider/law-firm side and corporate in-house global mobility).

 - Advanced proficiency in data tracking systems (Excel/Notion/HRIS trackers) with exceptional organizational and time-management capabilities.

 - Knowledge of local labour law.

 - Handle sensitive employee and legal information securely and with confidentiality.

 - Previous experience preparing and successfully submitting employment permit applications (BCR/foreign interest companies).

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/7b4d9365-92d2-425d-a0a4-700d16d82427/photo_office_M%20(1).png]


WHO YOU'LL BE WORKING WITH

At Volka, you’ll work both independently and collaboratively when needed, in a respectful and supportive environment that values your ideas and well-being. To succeed, you’ll need to stay organized, keep learning, and consistently bring your best to help achieve shared goals with the team.

Gaming has always been a big part of our lives. With our love for different genres, we never lose sight of what makes a game truly fun. We bring that passion into everything we create – making joyful, exciting experiences for players everywhere.


WHERE YOU'LL BE WORKING AT

Located in a historic three-story building in the heart of the city, our office offers a fresh, welcoming atmosphere – the perfect environment to feel inspired while staying focused and productive.

[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/5b4bb49f-81e7-43db-ab5a-6a09c4aa1deb/3f65919e-2b93-4765-88b1-77199ed741f2/photo_team_M%20(1).png]





ADDITIONAL PERKS

🧑‍⚕️ Medical

notes: Game development company with a focus on art and design
